subject: Text from Petra:
body: "Angel, would U say that the meeting won't be probably possible on 14th. He may be back only on 16th. He will call me next week. Sending tons of love P."
body_html: "Angel, would U say that the meeting won't be probably possible on 14th. He may be back only on 16th. He will call me next week. Sending tons of love P."
